creator: ac199@hwcn.org
text:
On Mon, Aug 17, 1998 at 02:28:53PM +0400, Andrey Zakhvatov wrote:
> 
> sed 's/^X//' >xataxx-1.0/pkg/PLIST << 'END-of-xataxx-1.0/pkg/PLIST'
> Xbin/xataxx
> Xman/man6/xataxx.6.gz
[...]
> sed 's/^X//' >xataxx-1.0/Makefile << 'END-of-xataxx-1.0/Makefile'
[...]
> XMAN6=		xataxx.6

<ahem>

[Don't list manpages both in MANx and the plist---they are added to
 the plist automatically].


-- 
This .sig is not innovative, witty, or profund.
